name: Crockpot Tacos or Burritos
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds sirloin, stew beef, or whatever is lean and on sale
recipeInstructions:
Leave meat in whole pieces; you may even put it in frozen.
In the morning, put the meat into the crockpot, add taco seasoning mix, and water. Plug in and set to simmer according to manufacturer's directions.
If time allows in the morning, shred the cheese and lettuce and chop the tomatoes. Store in ziplock or Rubbermaid containers in the refrigerator.
When meat is cooked, remove with a slotted spoon to a platter and allow to cool enough to handle. Place chicken breasts or beef on a cutting board and shred using a fork, discarding any pieces of fat. Return shredded meat to the crockpot. Warm refried beans in a small saucepan or microwave. Wrap tortillas in foil and warm in the oven.
Put remaining ingredients out in dishes on the table (or counter) and call for dinner loudly. Diners can assemble their own soft tacos or burritos with the ingredients they prefer.
